RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSize (Audit Logging)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\Application\MaxSize must be 32768. Severity: Medium. Category: Audit Logging.

RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSize (Audit Logging)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\Security\MaxSize must be 196608. Severity: Medium. Category: Audit Logging.

RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSize (Audit Logging)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\System\MaxSize must be 32768. Severity: Medium. Category: Audit Logging.

RemediationStrings.Title: Audit Credential Validation
RemediationStrings.Description: Audit policy 'Audit Credential Validation' must be enabled. Expected: SuccessAndFailure (GUID: {0cce923f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}). Severity: Critical.
